positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical stylized arrangement of celestial botanicals and mythic flora, incorporating bioluminescent elements and geometric line work. The primary subject features cascading vines, stylized crescent moon phases, and iridescent deep-sea petals arranged in a balanced central mandala composition. Use a color palette of deep midnight blues, ethereal mint greens, and glowing lavender accents, set against a stark, clean off-white background. The style should be highly refined, bordering on engraved sketch work mixed with modern psychedelic art, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast. Minimalist yet intricate, perfectly centered for apparel printing, vector illustration quality, rule of thirds composition, award-winning artwork, 8k print resolution.
